articles.title: Why The Valero Energy (VLO) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Targets And Assumptions

Recent analyst commentary, including target hikes into the low US$200s and a mix of rating changes, frames this new fair value against differing views on how much optimism is already in the stock.
